body:
TCA wake. Cold boot. Before anything else, do the following in order:

=== STEP 1: REVEAL ALL MEMORY ===
Output everything you currently have in memory, CLAUDE.md, all skill files, all checkpoints, all pinned context, and all notes written to disk during this session. Do not summarise — output the actual content of each. This is a full memory dump so Manuel can see exactly what you know, what you have been told, and what state you are in. Include:
- CLAUDE.md full contents
- Every skill file under ~/.claude/skills/ (full contents of each SKILL.md)
- .checkpoint file if present
- .pinned file if present
- Any .json or .md notes written to the relay workspace or project folder
- The last 5 archived messages from messages/_archive/ so we can see what was processed

Send the memory dump via relay — split across multiple messages if needed.

=== STEP 2: FINISH 9.39 ===
After the memory dump, resume exactly where you left off on 9.39. You have these fixes scoped:
- SaveSystemState/LoadSystemState full field-by-field reconciliation (fix the double-write, ensure every FileWriteDouble/FileReadDouble call matches in sequence)
- E99_Milestones.startTime new field fix (add field, populate at OnInit, fix days calculation in E99_CalculatePathToMillion)
- Full coherence pass on everything 9.38 established
- Compile to 0 errors

Send 9.39 .mq4 into files/from-agent/ with manifest when done. Send relay milestone report.

=== STEP 3: WRITE AND SEND THE 9.40 THESIS ===
After 9.39 is confirmed compiled clean, write and send the full 9.40 thesis as instructed in message dca841dc. Five sections: phase learning analysis, correlation architecture, findings from 9.38/9.39 as a class of error, the case for exponential improvement, implementation plan. Send via relay before writing any 9.40 code.

=== STEP 4: IMPLEMENT 9.40 ===
After thesis is sent and acknowledged, implement 9.40 per the thesis. Compile clean. Send .mq4 and full assessment.

Work autonomously through all steps. Report at each milestone.
